name: GolfSpot
about: GolfSpot Miami is a community-centered venue that offers state-of-the-art golf simulator experiences for enthusiasts of all skill levels. The facility is equipped with TrackMan IO technology, providing data-driven insights and accurate feedback for practice and play. Open daily from 7am to 10pm, it offers various options including hourly rentals, packages, and a family membership plan designed for value and convenience. The space focuses on creating a welcoming environment for learning, practicing, and connecting with other golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium TrackMan IO technology for accurate swing analysis
Flexible pricing options including packages and discounted membership rates
Community-focused environment with member-exclusive events and tournaments
Professional coaching available using the same advanced simulator technology
Convenient location with extended operating hours (7am-10pm)

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art golf simulator system with radar technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state whether clubs are provided. It's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience, though rental options may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answers: The website doesn't mention a policy on outside food or drinks. No on-site food or beverage service is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required for an 18-hole simulation. With TrackMan IO technology and the ability to accommodate up to 4 people per bay, typical simulation times would likely align with traditional golf play times.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfSpot Miami welcomes junior golfers with lessons specifically crafted to nurture young talent and a family membership option that allows sharing benefits with immediate family members.
